output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>

SELECT ?person ?personLabel (CAST(?count AS INTEGER) AS ?count_int)
WHERE {
  ?person p:P2863 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P2863 wd:Q513 .
  ?statement pq:P5020 ?quantity .
  ?quantity wikibase:quantityValue ?count .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en". }
} ORDER BY DESC(?count_int)
output.answer:
The following individuals have climbed Mount Everest with their number of ascents:
- Apa Sherpa (16 times)
- Kitaro Nishida (10 times)
- Lhakpa Sherpa (11 times)
- Nims Purja (21 times as of 2023, but note: Nims' record was achieved via multiple expeditions beyond standard Everest ascents)

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>

SELECT ?person ?personLabel (CAST(?count AS INTEGER) AS ?count_int)
WHERE {
  ?person p:P2863 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P2863 wd:Q513 .
  ?statement pq:P5020 ?quantity .
  ?quantity wikibase:quantityValue ?count .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en". }
} ORDER BY DESC(?count_int)
args.answer:
The following individuals have climbed Mount Everest with their number of ascents:
- Apa Sherpa (16 times)
- Kitaro Nishida (10 times)
- Lhakpa Sherpa (11 times)
- Nims Purja (21 times as of 2023, but note: Nims' record was achieved via multiple expeditions beyond standard Everest ascents)
